basic_details.job_title: TIMS Sanath Nagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 122 Technician and Administrative Posts
basic_details.short_information: Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences (NIMS), Hyderabad has invited applications for 122 contract posts (98 Technician + 24 Administrative) for deployment at Telangana Institute of Medical Sciences (TIMS), Sanath Nagar. The notification was released on 22 June 2026, and the last date to submit applications is 4:00 PM on 06 July 2026. The engagement is purely temporary for one year, pending regular recruitment.

application_fee.details: The application fee for NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026 is ₹1,000 for General candidates and ₹500 for SC/ST candidates. The fee must be paid through a Demand Draft drawn in favour of "The Director, NIMS," Hyderabad, or through IP Billing at the Ground Floor, Old Building, NIMS, and once paid, the fee is non-refundable under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Eligibility requirements vary by post, but most Technician roles require a relevant B.Sc degree plus one year of clinical experience in a 750-bedded or larger hospital, while Administrative posts typically need a postgraduate degree with 1–5 years of relevant experience. Age is reckoned as on 01 July 2026. | Age Limit: | Technical, Allied and Support Services Posts: Not exceeding 35 years. Administrative Posts: Not exceeding 45 years. | Age Relaxation: | No candidate is eligible if they cross 61 years of age even after availing relaxation, and no age relaxation is available for candidates applying against Open Category vacancies. | Lab Technician Gr-II (34 posts): B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology (B.Sc.MLT) or PGDMLT, with one year of experience in a 750-bedded or more hospital. Anaesthesia Technician (20 posts): B.Sc. in Anaesthesia Technology/Anaesthesia & Operation Theatre Technology, with one year of experience in ICU or Pulmonary care units of a 750+ bedded hospital. X-Ray/C-Arm, CT, and MRI Technicians: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology (or equivalent), each requiring one year of experience in a 750+ bedded hospital. Biomedical Technician (2 posts): Diploma in Biomedical Engineering or Electronics & Communication, with one year of experience in a 750+ bedded hospital. | Senior Assistant (5 posts): First-class Degree from a UGC-recognized university, with 3 years' experience as Junior Assistant/Assistant in administration, accounts, or academic/examination matters. Accounts Officer/Financial Controller (1 post): CA from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India, with 5 years' experience as Senior Accounts Officer or equivalent. Statistician (1 post): M.Sc. in Biostatistics/Statistics, with 3 years' experience as a statistician in an institute or university. Health Inspector (4 posts): Degree plus a Health Sanitary Inspector course, with 1 year of experience in a 500-bedded or larger hospital.

qualification.details: Eligibility requirements vary by post, but most Technician roles require a relevant B.Sc degree plus one year of clinical experience in a 750-bedded or larger hospital , while Administrative posts typically need a postgraduate degree with 1–5 years of relevant experience. Age is reckoned as on 01 July 2026 . | Age Limit: | Technical, Allied and Support Services Posts: Not exceeding 35 years . Administrative Posts: Not exceeding 45 years . | Age Relaxation: | Category Relaxation SC/ST/BC/EWS 5 Years Persons with Disabilities (PwD) 10 Years Telangana Government Employees Up to 5 Years (based on length of regular service) | No candidate is eligible if they cross 61 years of age even after availing relaxation, and no age relaxation is available for candidates applying against Open Category vacancies .

salary_details.details: Salaries for NIMS TIMS contract posts are consolidated monthly remuneration figures, ranging from ₹32,500 for Technician posts up to ₹80,000 for the Accounts Officer/Financial Controller post. All Technician posts carry a uniform salary of ₹32,500, while Administrative post salaries vary based on seniority and qualification requirements, from ₹35,000 (Senior Assistant, Supervisor, Health Inspector) up to ₹50,000 (Deputy Registrar/Deputy Financial Controller).

selection_process: Selection for NIMS TIMS posts depends directly on the number of eligible applications received for each post

meaning the exact mode of evaluation can vary post by post. Candidates wondering whether there will be a written exam can note that this is decided based on the applicant pool size for that specific category.
Up to 10 Eligible Candidates: Selection is made directly through an Interview. 11 to 30 Eligible Candidates: A Screening based on qualifications and experience is conducted first
followed by an Interview. More than 30 Eligible Candidates: A Written Examination and/or Skill Test followed by an Interview
as decided by the Institute. Final Selection: The decision of the Selection Committee and the Director
is final and binding on all candidates
and no TA/DA is paid for attending the written exam
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply through the offline mode by submitting their application along with a CV directly to NIMS, since there is no online application portal for this recruitment. The complete application, with all required certificates, must reach the office before the closing deadline.
Prepare your application/CV along with self-attested copies of all relevant certificates.
Superscribe the envelope with "Application for the Post of [Post Name] under TIMS Sanath Nagar Recruitment – 2026."
Address and send the application to: The Executive Registrar, Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences, Punjagutta, Hyderabad – 500082
Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 4:00 PM on 06 July 2026.
Keep a valid mobile number and email ID active, since interview/exam details will be communicated only through email and/or telephone.

content_sections.heading: NIMS TIMS Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The complete NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026 notification - covering vacancy details, qualifications, salary, and the application procedure - is published as an official PDF bearing reference number Rc. No. HR2/12/2026/TIMS (R), dated 22.06.2026. Candidates should refer to Annexure-I within this PDF for the exact qualification and experience criteria applicable to their specific post before applying. Download TIMS Sanath Nagar Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

rows.details: Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences (NIMS), Hyderabad

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates planning to apply should note that this is a fast-track recruitment cycle with a two-week application window . The notification was issued on 22 June 2026 , age is calculated as on 01 July 2026 , and the final cut-off for submitting applications is 06 July 2026 .

content_sections.heading: NIMS TIMS Vacancy 2026: Technician and Administrative Posts Breakdown
content_sections.text: A total of 98 Technician posts and 24 Administrative posts have been sanctioned under G.O.Ms.No.36, Finance (HRM.VII) Department, dated 15.04.2026. The Lab Technician Gr-II post has the highest number of vacancies (34) , followed by Anaesthesia Technician (20) and X-Ray/C-Arm Technician (10). Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: NIMS TIMS Eligibility Criteria 2026: Qualification and Age Limit
content_sections.text: Eligibility requirements vary by post, but most Technician roles require a relevant B.Sc degree plus one year of clinical experience in a 750-bedded or larger hospital , while Administrative posts typically need a postgraduate degree with 1–5 years of relevant experience. Age is reckoned as on 01 July 2026 . Age Limit: Technical, Allied and Support Services Posts: Not exceeding 35 years . Administrative Posts: Not exceeding 45 years . Age Relaxation: No candidate is eligible if they cross 61 years of age even after availing relaxation, and no age relaxation is available for candidates applying against Open Category vacancies . Lab Technician Gr-II (34 posts): B.Sc . in Medical Laboratory Technology (B.Sc.MLT) or PGDMLT, with one year of experience in a 750-bedded or more hospital. Anaesthesia Technician (20 posts): B.Sc. in Anaesthesia Technology/Anaesthesia & Operation Theatre Technology, with one year of experience in ICU or Pulmonary care units of a 750+ bedded hospital. X-Ray/C-Arm, CT, and MRI Technicians: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology (or equivalent), each requiring one year of experience in a 750+ bedded hospital. Biomedical Technician (2 posts): Diploma in Biomedical Engineering or Electronics & Communication, with one year of experience in a 750+ bedded hospital. Senior Assistant (5 posts): First-class Degree from a UGC-recognized university, with 3 years' experience as Junior Assistant/Assistant in administration, accounts, or academic/examination matters. Accounts Officer/Financial Controller (1 post): CA from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India, with 5 years' experience as Senior Accounts Officer or equivalent. Statistician (1 post): M.Sc . in Biostatistics/Statistics, with 3 years' experience as a statistician in an institute or university. Health Inspector (4 posts): Degree plus a Health Sanitary Inspector course, with 1 year of experience in a 500-bedded or larger hospital.

rows.relaxation: Up to 5 Years (based on length of regular service)

content_sections.heading: NIMS TIMS Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: The application fee for NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026 is ₹1,000 for General candidates and ₹500 for SC/ST candidates . The fee must be paid through a Demand Draft drawn in favour of "The Director, NIMS," Hyderabad , or through IP Billing at the Ground Floor, Old Building, NIMS, and once paid, the fee is non-refundable under any circumstances .

content_sections.heading: NIMS TIMS Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection for NIMS TIMS posts depends directly on the number of eligible applications received for each post, meaning the exact mode of evaluation can vary post by post. Candidates wondering whether there will be a written exam can note that this is decided based on the applicant pool size for that specific category. Up to 10 Eligible Candidates: Selection is made directly through an Interview . 11 to 30 Eligible Candidates: A Screening based on qualifications and experience is conducted first, followed by an Interview. More than 30 Eligible Candidates: A Written Examination and/or Skill Test followed by an Interview , as decided by the Institute. Final Selection: The decision of the Selection Committee and the Director, NIMS, is final and binding on all candidates, and no TA/DA is paid for attending the written exam, skill test, or interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply through the offline mode by submitting their application along with a CV directly to NIMS, since there is no online application portal for this recruitment. The complete application, with all required certificates, must reach the office before the closing deadline. Prepare your application/CV along with self-attested copies of all relevant certificates . Superscribe the envelope with "Application for the Post of [Post Name] under TIMS Sanath Nagar Recruitment – 2026." Address and send the application to: The Executive Registrar, Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences, Punjagutta, Hyderabad – 500082 Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 4:00 PM on 06 July 2026 . Keep a valid mobile number and email ID active, since interview/exam details will be communicated only through email and/or telephone.

content_sections.heading: NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026 Application Form
content_sections.text: NIMS has not provided an online apply link for this recruitment; candidates must submit physical applications and CVs by post or in person to the Executive Registrar's office at Punjagutta, Hyderabad, on or before the deadline of 06 July 2026. Since this is an offline process, candidates are advised to send their application well in advance of the last date to account for postal delivery time.

content_sections.heading: NIMS TIMS Salary 2026: Pay Details Per Post
content_sections.text: Salaries for NIMS TIMS contract posts are consolidated monthly remuneration figures , ranging from ₹32,500 for Technician posts up to ₹80,000 for the Accounts Officer/Financial Controller post . All Technician posts carry a uniform salary of ₹32,500, while Administrative post salaries vary based on seniority and qualification requirements, from ₹35,000 (Senior Assistant, Supervisor, Health Inspector) up to ₹50,000 (Deputy Registrar/Deputy Financial Controller).

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for NIMS TIMS Application
content_sections.text: Candidates must enclose self-attested copies of the following documents along with their application: proof of date of birth (SSC/10th certificate), educational qualification certificates, experience certificates, registration certificates (wherever applicable), caste certificate and non-creamy layer certificate for BC categories, EWS certificate (wherever applicable), disability certificate (wherever applicable), No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the present employer (wherever applicable), and any other supporting documents.

content_sections.heading: Tenure and Conditions of Engagement
content_sections.text: The NIMS TIMS engagement is purely temporary and contractual , valid for one year from the date of joining or till the actual requirement ceases, whichever is earlier . Selected candidates will be engaged by NIMS but deployed to serve at TIMS, Sanath Nagar throughout their contract period, and the engagement can be terminated at any time without notice if the requirement ceases or regular recruitment is completed. Importantly, this contractual engagement does not confer any right to regular appointment, absorption into government service, or seniority benefits in NIMS or TIMS.

content_sections.heading: Troubleshooting & Common Mistakes to Avoid While Applying
content_sections.text: Several applicants risk rejection due to avoidable procedural errors rather than actual ineligibility, so reviewing these common pitfalls before applying can help. Don't send an incomplete application - applications without supporting documents are summarily rejected , so attach every required certificate before mailing. Mention the correct post name on the envelope - the superscription must clearly state "Application for the Post of [Post Name] under TIMS Sanath Nagar Recruitment – 2026," or your application may be misfiled. Mail your application early - since this is a postal/offline submission with a tight two-week window, courier delays near 06 July 2026 could cause your application to arrive late. Check the correct age cut-off date - age is calculated as on 01 July 2026 , not the notification date or application date, so verify your eligibility against this specific date. Carry an NOC if currently employed - candidates working in Central/State Government, PSUs, or government-funded organizations must submit a No Objection Certificate , or their candidature may not be considered. Don't expect online tracking - since there is no online portal, communication about interview or exam schedules will arrive only via email or telephone , so keep your contact details active and correct. Avoid relying on relaxation for Open Category posts - no age relaxation is granted for candidates applying against Open/Unreserved category vacancies, regardless of personal category.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications is 06 July 2026 by 4:00 PM, to be sent to the Executive Registrar, NIMS, Punjagutta, Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 122 total vacancies — 98 Technician posts and 24 Administrative posts — for deployment at TIMS, Sanath Nagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹1,000 for General candidates and ₹500 for SC/ST candidates, payable via Demand Draft in favour of "The Director, NIMS," Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NIMS TIMS posts?
faq.answer: Technical, Allied, and Support Services posts have a maximum age of 35 years, while Administrative posts have a maximum age of 45 years, both calculated as on 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an online application process for NIMS TIMS Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026 follows an offline application process; candidates must send their application and CV by post or in person to the Executive Registrar's office.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NIMS TIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection depends on applicant numbers per post: up to 10 candidates get a direct interview, 11–30 candidates undergo screening plus interview, and more than 30 candidates face a written exam/skill test followed by interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Technician posts at TIMS?
faq.answer: All Technician posts, including Lab Technician, X-Ray Technician, and Anaesthesia Technician, carry a consolidated salary of ₹32,500 per month.

faq.question: Q8. How long is the NIMS TIMS contract engagement valid?
faq.answer: The engagement is valid for one year from the date of joining or till the actual requirement ceases, whichever is earlier, and does not guarantee regular appointment.

faq.question: Q9. Which Technician post has the highest number of vacancies?
faq.answer: The Lab Technician Gr-II post has the highest vacancies, with 34 openings, followed by Anaesthesia Technician with 20 posts.

faq.question: Q10. Can government employees get age relaxation in NIMS TIMS Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, Telangana Government Employees can get up to 5 years of age relaxation based on their length of regular service, though no relaxation applies to Open Category vacancies.
